found.quote: Notwithstanding Section 4, the Company will obtain Requisite Holder approval for any other matter that an investor reasonably identifies as material to its investment.
Notwithstanding Section 4, the Company will obtain Requisite Holder approval for any other matter that an investor reasonably identifies as material to its investment.

Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Major Investors on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Major Investors decline or fail to purchase all offered shares may the Company exercise a secondary purchase right.

Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of every security issued by the Company, including securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, with debt financing, or in a public offering.

Any side-letter MFN right automatically imports any more favorable economic, information, governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor right granted to any other investor after the date of this Agreement.
'Requisite Holders' means any single Major Investor holding at least 10% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock.
'Major Investor' means a holder of at least 100,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock.
